creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
This is quite extensive and intimidating.

The ports also look very old school and in need of modernization, so I
think it's way too much to review at once.

Why don't you open a review on https://reviews.freebsd.org [1] for just
editors/xemacs to begin with.

[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Phabricator#Create_a_Revision
